create_table_sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sai_contacts (
    id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    phone TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    email TEXT,
    first_name TEXT,
    last_name TEXT,
    company TEXT,
    role TEXT,
    location_city TEXT,
    location_state TEXT,
    location_country TEXT DEFAULT 'US',
    source TEXT DEFAULT 'bland_ai',
    source_campaign TEXT,
    referrer TEXT,
    batch_id TEXT,
    last_call_id TEXT,
    last_call_date TIMESTAMPTZ,
    total_calls INTEGER DEFAULT 1,
    call_outcome TEXT,
    is_decision_maker BOOLEAN,
    interested_in TEXT,
    pain_points JSONB,
    objections JSONB,
    pipeline_stage TEXT DEFAULT 'new',
    appointment_time TIMESTAMPTZ,
    callback_time TIMESTAMPTZ,
    follow_up_date DATE,
    motivation TEXT,
    desired_outcome TEXT,
    mission TEXT,
    vision TEXT,
    heroic_unique_identity TEXT,
    road_blocks TEXT,
    close_confidence INTEGER,
    budget_mentioned BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    call_summary TEXT,
    transcript TEXT,
    raw_variables JSONB,
    raw_analysis JSONB,
    sai_notes TEXT,
    next_action TEXT
);
